# tfe_scim_token

Provides a resource which manages TFE SCIM tokens. These tokens are used for authentication when using the TFE SCIM API.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) The description of the SCIM token.

### Optional

- `expired_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token expires.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of the SCIM token.
- `last_used_at` (String) The time when the SCIM token was last used.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The value of the SCIM token. This is only set on creation and cannot be read afterwards for security purposes.
